description: Minute fragment of a legal document. Practically the only information preserved is that it was drawn up in Egypt in the year 1444 Seleucid, which is 1132/33 CE. The identification of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe's scribal hand by Weiss seems tentative given how faded and brief the text is.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
